children.name: stops cover poll once all items have a cover_url
trendingLoading is true initially and false after fetch
fetches all 4 lanes independently on mount
one lane failing does not affect other lanes
filters in-library titles from each lane
renders skeleton pulse when cover_url is null
renders img when cover_url is set
shows book emoji on img error not skeleton
shows title and author below cover
calls onAdded (closes modal) after successful add
does not call onAdded when add fails
submit triggers searchManga with current query
submit does nothing when query is blank
navigates to library after handleAdd succeeds
sets searchError on 502 with generic discovery message
tracks added manga by mangaupdates_id (MU source)
tracks added manga by mangaupdates_id for non-MU sources
addTitle is called with source field
addTitle for anilist result sends anilist source
addingId is set to mangaupdates_id while add is in flight
availableTypes derived from all result content_type values
filteredData returns all results when contentTypeFilter is undefined
filteredData returns only matching content_type when filter set
setContentTypeFilter resets to undefined when called with current value (toggle off)
availableTypes includes hentai when explicit results present
resets contentTypeFilter when new search is submitted
shows 18+ badge when is_explicit is true
does not show 18+ badge when is_explicit is false
does not show 18+ badge for adult tag when is_explicit is false
shows 18+ badge for hentai content_type only when is_explicit is true
shows Add button when not in library
calls onAdd when Add button is clicked
shows In Library button when inLibrary is true
calls onView with libraryId when In Library button is clicked
shows loading indicator when addingId matches result id
Add button is disabled while adding
Add button is enabled when addingId refers to a different result
renders cover image when cover_url is provided
renders cover placeholder (pulse skeleton) when no cover_url
returns null when availableTypes is empty
shows "All" and only types in availableTypes
calls onChange with the content type value when a pill is clicked
shows Hentai pill when hentai is in availableTypes
calls onChange("hentai") when Hentai pill is clicked
does not show Hentai pill when hentai not in availableTypes
shows Novel pill when novel is in availableTypes
shows confirm dialog after trash button click
calls onRemove(true) from "Remove + delete files" confirm
uses cover_url directly when it starts with http
uses /api/ cover_url directly without falling back to coverUrl
falls back to api.coverUrl when cover_url is null
falls back to api.coverUrl on img error
shows badge when has_sync_warnings=true and total_chapters=0
hides badge when has_sync_warnings=true but total_chapters>0
hides badge when has_sync_warnings=false even with total_chapters=0
fetches on mount and sets data
sets removingId during removal then clears it
polls every 2s when a manga is syncing
shows Download button when not downloaded and has_sources
shows no download button when has_sources is false and not downloaded
calls onCancelDownload when Queued button clicked
shows download progress bar and % when downloading with pages
hides download progress bar when pages_total is 0
shows read progress bar when started but not completed
shows "no sources" message when hasSyncWarnings is true
does not show "no sources" message when hasSyncWarnings is false
no Retry button when hasSyncWarnings=true but isRemoteSource=false
prev button disabled on page 0, enabled otherwise
at last page with next chapter — Next becomes "Next Ch." and navigates
at last page with no next chapter — Next disabled
at first page with prev chapter — Prev becomes "Prev Ch." and navigates
shows Prev Ch. / Next Ch. buttons
both disabled when no adjacent chapters
defaults to 100 when no stored value
falls back to 100 for invalid stored value
apply updates state and persists to localStorage
opens popover on click showing all levels
calls onApply with selected level and closes popover
defaults to 16 when no stored value
falls back to 16 for invalid stored value
apply updates state and persists to localStorage
calls onApply with selected size and closes popover
opens browse modal when Browse plugins button clicked
closes browse modal when X button clicked
install plugin calls api.installPlugin and reloads sources
shows error when add source fails with 502
toggle source calls patchSource with flipped enabled
renders capture level buttons and show filter
shows "No entries." when log buffer is empty
renders log entries in the table
filter hides entries below selected level
calls setLogLevel when capture level button clicked
defaults to library tab for admins
defaults to account tab for non-admins
renders manga title and chapter number
shows remove button for non-downloading items
calls onRemove when button is clicked
shows progress bar and percentage when downloading with pages
hides progress bar when pages_total is 0
does not show progress bar when status is pending
sorts by status order (pending before done)
canClear true when completed items exist
canClear false when only active items
starts with empty fields and no error
calls api.login and setToken on successful submit
redirects to home when token valid — setup already complete
stays on setup when token invalid (server wiped)
does not call onChange when clicking active option
calls onChange false when currently true
redirects to /setup when needs_setup is true
renders login when needs_setup is false
shows spinner while authStatus is pending
